name: OpenCode Runtime
summary: Set up OpenCode as a formal NextClaw runtime entry on the narp-stdio(acp) path, with ACP readiness checks and real model plus agent task smoke.

summaryI18n.en: Set up OpenCode as a formal NextClaw runtime entry on the narp-stdio(acp) path, with ACP readiness checks and real model plus agent task smoke.
summaryI18n.zh: 把 OpenCode 按 narp-stdio(acp) 路径接成正式 NextClaw runtime，并覆盖 ACP 就绪检查、真实模型与 agent 任务冒烟。

description: Use this skill when OpenCode/opencode needs to become a formal NextClaw session type instead of a core runtime fork or legacy plugin path. It guides `opencode acp` installation checks, runtime entry setup, OpenCode provider config isolation, session-type readiness, and real text plus file-writing agent smoke.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when OpenCode/opencode needs to become a formal NextClaw session type instead of a core runtime fork or legacy plugin path. It guides `opencode acp` installation checks, runtime entry setup, OpenCode provider config isolation, session-type readiness, and real text plus file-writing agent smoke.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当需要把 OpenCode/opencode 接成正式 NextClaw 会话类型，而不是新增 core runtime 或走旧插件路径时使用。它覆盖 `opencode acp` 安装检查、runtime entry 配置、OpenCode provider 隔离配置、会话类型就绪，以及真实文本与文件写入 agent 冒烟。

author: NextClaw
